title: AgentV Forensic Policy Specification (v1.0.0)
description: Schema for defining forensic artifact retention via extension filtering and pattern matching.

extensions.description: List of file extensions to permit in the session vault.

mandatory_patterns.description: Regex patterns for files that MUST be retained regardless of other rules.

exclusion_patterns.description: Regex patterns for files that MUST be pruned from the vault.

max_artifact_size.description: The maximum size in bytes for any individual forensic artifact.
